top_signals.title: US Strikes Iran and Blocks Oil Sales in New Test of Ceasefire
top_signals.summary: The US carried out a new round of strikes in Iran targeting more than 80 sites and revoked a waiver allowing new sales of Iranian oil, further imperiling a peace agreement after a series of attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bank of England plans to ease capital rule for UK lenders
top_signals.summary: Officials say move intended to boost lending and support financial markets in a crisis
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The GitHub Actions Attack Pattern Your CI Security Scanners Miss
top_signals.summary: ActiveState explains how GitHub Actions attack chains can evade traditional CI security scanners, why passing a scan doesn't guarantee a secure pipeline, and how organizations can better govern their CI/CD workflows. [...]
